# huggingface-paper-publisher
## When to Use
Use to package and publish a research artifact release on Hugging Face around a paper, including cards, linked models, datasets, Spaces, and collections.
## Do Not Use When
Do not use for drafting the paper text itself or fixing GitHub Actions logs.
## Required Inputs
Paper URL or identifier, artifacts, Hub repo targets, cards, license, and release checklist.
## Workflow
1. Inventory paper-linked artifacts.
2. Prepare model, dataset, or Space cards.
3. Upload or update Hub repos.
4. Verify links, license, and collection metadata.
